meaning: n.(棉纱,电线等的)卷轴,(磁带等的)一盘,旋转,蹒跚vt.卷...于轴上,使旋转vi.蹒跚地走,旋转,眩晕,骚乱,退缩,摇晃
examples: The reel comes complete with a set of spares for all the working parts.
The rod bent double, the reel shrieked and ratcheted.
The musicians burst into a rousing rendition of "Paddy Casey's Reel."
Sure, there are times when splurging to reel in a big fish free agent makes sense.
Cerullo, 54, would also like to reel in more financial support for his programming.
